xml.introduction: The episode begins in the Candy Kingdom, Jake is playfully chasing Lady Rainicorn.

line.dialogue: Yeah, you think you're pretty way up there but I can get you! he stretches to be on Lady's level.
나 잡아봐봐~ ("Catch me if you can.")

line.stage: Finn and Princess Bubblegum are in a cemetery with a table full of different chemicals.

line.dialogue: Alright. Let me just add three more drops of explosive diarrhea.

line.stage: She adds the explosive diarrhea and a giant cloud shaped like a skull puffs out. Not a good omen.

line.dialogue: Oooo...
Hey Princess Bubblegum, when we bring the dead back to life, will it be filled with worms?
No. If my decorpsinator serum works, all the dead Candy People will look as young and healthy as you do.

line.stage: Finn does a "Tarzan-yell" while hitting his hands against his chest.

line.dialogue: Pick up that platter, tough guy.

line.stage: Finn picks up a serving platter and open the lid, revealing a Candy Person corpse.

line.dialogue: Old Mr. Cream Puff?
Giggles We used to date. Applies the serum.

line.stage: Mr. Cream Puff's corpse starts to glow and overflow with the fizzing serum.

line.dialogue: Something's happening! Come on, come on...
Work.

line.stage: A zombie Mr. Cream Puff arises and moans.

line.dialogue: Algebraic!
Wait, something's wrong.
Sugar! Squirts serum out of his eyes and mouth
Ew!

line.stage: Zombie Mr. Cream Puff leaps into a giant test tube. The test tube falls and infects the whole cemetery. Zombie Candy People begin to arise from their graves.

line.dialogue: Hey, look, the decorpsinator serum is working!
No, this is wrong. They're not coming back to life--they're still dead! The decorpsinator serum--it's incomplete! she rubs the head of a candy person that looks like a love heart.
lashing out at Princess Bubblegum Rah. Must eat sugar!
Pushes him back down You're grounded, Mister.
Oh, this is really bad. They're going to be attracted to the Candy Kingdom!
Why?
Because the Candy People are made of sugar, ya ding dong!
On Princess Bubblegum Gimme some sugar, baby.
Chew on this! Kicks him
Giggles Good one, Finn. Quickly, to the kingdom!

line.stage: They run out of the cemetery

line.dialogue: Kicks another zombie Get a life!

line.stage: Princess Bubblegum is at the top of her castle, ringing a large bell

line.dialogue: All citizens of the Candy Kingdom! Report to the palace, immediately!

line.stage: Candy People mumble in confusion and walk to the palace

line.dialogue: Whoa!

line.stage: Jake and Lady go off to the palace. Princess Bubblegum notices the zombies slowly leaving the cemetery.

line.dialogue: worried Hurry, sweet citizens.
Alright, you heard the princess, everyone in! Alright, no pushing, come on!
Dude, what's up?
The princess will explain everything. Tree Trunks, get those hot buns in here, girl.
Carrying hot cross buns Oh, I hope it's not bad news.

line.stage: Princess Bubblegum and Finn close the door

line.dialogue: Did we get everyone?
All present and accounted for.
Thanks, Manfried.
You're welcome.
Citizens, we are assembled here in the candy foyer for a momentous announcement. Tonight we are all going to have... a slumber party!
What?!

line.stage: Crowd cheers

line.dialogue: Wait! What about the zom--?! Princess Bubblegum covers his mouth
Go ahead and start partying.
Voice muffled But, Princess, the Undead--
Carries Finn to the lab We'll be right back, everyone.
Whooo!

line.stage: In the lab

line.dialogue: Finn, the Candy People can't know about the zombies.
Wha?!
If they knew, they would flip out.
What do you mean "flip out"?
I mean they would flip out.

line.stage: Scene changes to the cemetery; Starchy arrives with a shovel.

line.dialogue: Princess? It's me, Starchy the gravedigger. I brought you a larger corpse shovel. Oh, Princess? Well, I'll just wait for you here, then. By the mausoleum. With my back turned. And my defenses lowered.

line.stage: As Starchy does so, Candy Zombie comes out of the mausoleum and goes up to Starchy, Starchy starts to scream and gasp and then... KABOOM!!! He explodes in a flash of light. Back at the castle.

line.dialogue: Candy People explode when they get scared?!
Not telling the Candy People about the zombies is so important that you need to promise, Royal Promise, not to let anyone find out about the zombies, ever.
Okay, sure.
No, Finn. You have to Royal Promise.
Yes, kneels I Royal Promise.
Now I must cloister myself in the lab and finish the equation to my decorpsinator serum. You keep the candy folk distracted and ignorant. Can you do that?
Yes, your highness.
Good. Don't tell anyone about the zombies. Never ever. She leaves
No, wait. Can I at least tell Jake enters Jake?
Tell me about what, dude?
You know, about the outbreak of zom-- Covers his mouth
Chuckles Alright, what's going on?
Uhh, nothing at all, buddy! Laughs awkwardly and skips into the foyer
Hey, dude. I think you and Bubblegum are up to something.
nervously Ahha ah, what? No, no way.
Whoa, you guys are up to something. Is it some sort of prank? Can I get in on it?
To party-goers Who wants to play "Truth or Dare"?
Hmm...
Ok, Chocoberry, you may ask someone to tell a deep truth or a saucy dare.
Mr. Cupcake, truth or dare?
Dare.
I dare you to take off your wrapper.

line.stage: Everyone goes "Oooh"

line.dialogue: Shoulders Finn Hey seriously, man. I'm your bro. Bros are supposed to tell bros everything all the time. What are you and Bubblegum up to? Is everything alright?
Yep! Fine! Everything is great! Heh, heh. Crinkling sound Except for that. Whoa.

line.stage: Mr. Cupcake has shed his wrapper

line.dialogue: I didn't know he was chocolate.
Jake, truth or dare?
Truth.
Do you prefer chocolate or fudge?
I can't eat chocolate or fudge 'cause I'm a dog and they'd probably kill me, but hmmmmm probably... neither. Finn! Truth or dare?
Dare! Haha!
I dare you... to tell me the truth about what's going on in your mind. What were you and Bubblegum talking about when you were alone together?

line.stage: Everybody goes "Oooh"

line.dialogue: Nervously Umm, ahh, the truth is, ahhh...

line.stage: Finn visualizes Princess Bubblegum's face on Jake

line.dialogue: You promised you wouldn't freakin' tell anyone! Oh, you're so cute, Finn.
Ahhh... the truth is... that I'd rather play Dodge Socks!

line.stage: Finn throws a sock at Jake, Princess Bubblegum's face goes away

line.dialogue: I'm not playing dodge socks 'til you stop dodging my questions. Hey... Sniffs socks Old Mr. Cream Puff? Isn't he dead?
Hey, give me my sock back! Dodge Socks was a bad idea!
Whoa. angrily Look dude, just tell me what's up, 'cause you are crazier than a cannonball tonight.

line.stage: Finn looks out a window behind Jake and sees the zombies coming

line.dialogue: Thinking Oh, my goodness! Princess hasn't finished the equation and the zombies are here!

I, uh, she just want this slumber party to be super fun, and if I did have something to tell you, then I would in a second, and it would make my life easier, unless there was something stopping me, like a promise, but there isn't, so I won't, so it's cool.

line.stage: Zombie arises by the window behind Jake

line.dialogue: Sugar!

line.stage: Finn shuts the shutters

line.dialogue: What? You lost me.
Umm... Hey, you know what time it is?
Adventure time?
No, time for Seven Minutes in Heaven! You're first.
Really?
Lady Rainicorn! In the closet with Jake!
뭐? 나? 웃겨 정말. 그래, 좋아. 하자. ("What? Me? You gotta be kidding me. Okay, then. I'll play.")
Okay, okay, alright. Closet door closes on Jake and Lady But in seven minutes, I'm gonna come out and make you spill your beans, Finn.
I can't hear you all the way in heaven!

line.stage: Finn looks out a window, a horde of zombies shouting "Sugar" comes and begins banging on door

line.dialogue: Umm, does anyone else hear that?
What? Hear what? I, I don't hear anything.

line.stage: Candy People begin to murmur as they too hear the banging.

line.dialogue: I hear something I don't understand... and it makes me scared! Begins to shake.
What? No, Chet. Everybody, wait. What noise? You mean this noise? Turns on a radio and party lights comes on.
Oh. Laughs
Yeah! Dance it! Bust it up! Uh! Uh! Uh! Oh!

line.stage: A zombie comes out of the main door, Finn rushes to the door, grabbing a table

line.dialogue: What is this game you are playing at now, Finn?

line.stage: Finn barricades the door with the table

line.dialogue: Uhh, it's... Blockado. Haha, the game of barricades. Come on, let's block all the entrances and windows!

line.stage: Candy People cheer and begin blockading the doors and windows before the zombies can come in

line.dialogue: Alright, this is not a permanent solution. Think Finn, how can you keep everyone from finding out?
Find out about what, Finn?
Manfried, the talking piñata! Your convenient appearance gives me a great idea. Everyone, grab a stick! New game! We're gonna smash some piñatas!
What?
Except for you, Manfried.
Oh, thank goodness.

line.stage: Finn takes some strips off of Taffy Girl

line.dialogue: Now everybody don these blindfolds. Whispering Thanks, Taffy Girl.

line.stage: Finn runs into the middle of the blindfolded Candy People swinging sticks

line.dialogue: Alright, everybody, get together. I'm hanging the piñatas... The zombies burst through the barricades They're all around you. Smash the piñatas!

line.stage: Finn and the Candy People smash all the zombies

line.dialogue: Yeah! You guys are on fire!

line.stage: Chocoberry smashes a zombie, causing candy to fall out. She kneels down and licks the candy.

line.dialogue: Oh, it is so tasty.

line.stage: All the Candy Zombies are smashed and the Candy People are eating their candy

line.dialogue: Yes! We did it! My improbable plan worked!

line.stage: Jake and Lady come out of the closet

line.dialogue: Whew!
안녕! ("Hello!")
Seven minutes up yet? Grabs a jelly filled doughnut and eats it, noticing the zombie corpses. Whoa! Runs to Finn What the nuts happened here?!
Oh, we killed all the zombies that Princess Bubblegum and I raised from the dead.
Really!?

line.stage: Time freezes, leaving only Finn moving in the room.

line.dialogue: Jake? What's going on?

line.stage: Princess Bubblegum enters, unaffected by the freezing.

line.dialogue: What? Huh? Oh, Finn! Did you break your Royal Promise?
Yeah, but, I mean, all the zombies are dead. The Candy People won't freak out. What's the big deal?
This is really, really bad, Finn. You can't break Royal Promises. Never, ever, never. No matter what, forever.

line.stage: The room starts shaking

line.dialogue: The Guardians of the Royal Promise are coming for us.

line.stage: A hand bursts through the ceiling and grabs Finn and Princess Bubblegum and pulls them outside

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Finn the Human. You have broken a Royal Promise for which the penalty is trial by fire.

line.stage: Guardian 2 breathes fire

line.dialogue: That's stupid.
Wait! He's my friend! Isn't there another option?!
Yes. Because you care for the promise-breaker, we will give him a less hot trial. You must now answer...
...Math questions!
Mathematical!
Finn, you're terrible at math.
Awww.
Now, solve this! Puts Finn in front of Guardian 2, who puts up a hologram of an overly complicated math equation
Uhh....
Oh, wait, wait, I thought of a better one. Replaces the equation with one that says "2+2"
Yes! Two plus two. Solve it or die.
Uhh. Four, right?

line.stage: Guardians laugh

line.dialogue: Oh, correct.

line.stage: Guardians heads explode and time rewinds, night becomes day, Guardian 2's head comes back and he talks backwards and goes back to sitting and blowing bubbles around the Candy Kingdom.

line.dialogue: What's happening, Princess?
You've defeated the broken royal promise! The Gumball Guardians are resetting!

line.stage: Guardian 1 drops Finn and Princess Bubblegum, who teleport back to Princess Bubblegum's lab

line.dialogue: Slamacow! That was tops! Who's not good at math? I was all "Four!"
Four, four... Four, four, four... That's it! The answer was so simple, I was too smart to see it!
You're welcome!
'4' is the last figure I need to perfect my decorpsinator serum.

line.stage: In the foyer, Princess Bubblegum pours the serum on a zombie

line.dialogue: Golly!

line.stage: Finn and Princess Bubblegum pour the serum on all the zombies

line.dialogue: Woohoo! Yeah!
This is messed up, but sweet.
진짜로. ("Truly it is.")

line.stage: Finn and Princess Bubblegum revive more Candy Zombies

line.dialogue: Uncle Chewy!
Grandma!
Former dead relative!
Starchy!
Mornin'.
Walks over to Finn Man, you broke a Royal Promise? You're nuts. All you had to do is say that it was a royal secret. I know what's up. Walks away from Finn.
I hope you grasp the full consequences of breaking promises.
Heck yeah! If I break a Royal Promise, I get to fight zombies, throw slumber parties, awake Gumball Guardians and... and...
Alright, alright.
evilly And reverse death itself!
Oh, you are adorable. But keep your promises, okay?
I will, Princess.

line.stage: Finn notices Starchy gnawing on his leg and picks him up

line.dialogue: Starchy, you're not a zombie.
I can't help it. Flesh is delicious!
You're delicious!
Don't squeeze me! I'll fart!

line.stage: Finn squeezes him, Starchy farts
